trigger.evidence: Learner said, 'I can code it but I do not understand why weights are multiplied.'

checkpoint.next_action: Refine implementation and explain the weighted sum.

deep_dive.micro_challenge: Given inputs [2, 3] and weights [0.5, 4], calculate the dot product.
deep_dive.targeted_explanation: The dot product multiplies matching positions and adds the results, producing one score from two aligned vectors.

completion.summary: The learner connected weighted sums to dot products.
completion.relationship_to_original_topic: The perceptron uses a dot product to combine each input with its matching weight.
